name: Sidma S.A. Steel Products
summary: Sidma S.A. Steel Products engages in processing and trading of steel products in Greece and internationally. The company operates in two segments, Steel and Other. It offers flat products, such as hot rolled, pickled and oiled, chequered and tear drop, cold rolled, galvanized, stainless, pre painted, and plastified surface coils and sheets, as well as corrugated and trapezoidal sheets, hot rolled plates, shipbuilding plates, boiler plates, and abrasion resistant plates. The company also provides long products, including hot rolled steel bars with rectangular, square, equilateral and non-equilateral angular, T-shaped cross-section; hot rolled beams with U-shaped cross-section, hot rolled narrow flange I-beams with taper flanges, and hot rolled medium and wide flange I-beams with parallel flanges; hot rolled bulbflats for shipbuilding purposes; and hot rolled KS crane rails and ASCE rails. In addition, it offers tubes comprising electric resistance welding (ERW) uncoated selfcolor steel profiles, ERW zinc-coated steel profiles, ERW uncoated selfcolor construction steel pipes, and ERW zinc-coated hot-dip galvanized construction steel pipes for steel pipes for industrial, structural and general use, as well as wire products. Sidma S.A. Steel Products was founded in 1931 and is headquartered in Athens, Greece.
